headline: Cramer: natural gas shortage coming, Devon Energy positioned well
summary: Jim Cramer fielded a call from a viewer named Richard in North Carolina recently, and the topic was Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN). Richard called it undervalued given its pending merger. Cramer agreed, but the more interesting part of his answer was the macro case he made underneath it. “Great natural gas portfolio. It’s not necessarily going ... Cramer: natural gas shortage coming, Devon Energy positioned well

headline: Piper Sandler Maintains Overweight on Coterra Energy, Raises Price Target to $47
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Mark Lear   maintains Coterra Energy (NYSE:CTRA) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $41 to $47.
